recommendations.title: The Last Summer
recommendations.overview: Standing on the precipice of adulthood, a group of friends navigate new relationships, while reexamining others, during their final summer before college.

recommendations.title: Barfi!
recommendations.overview: The heartwarming tale of Barfi, a charming deaf-mute young man from 1970s Darjeeling, and two unalike women who can't help but fall for him.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Problem Child 2
recommendations.overview: Junior and his father, Ben, move from Cold River to Mortville. Junior becomes threatened by Ben's desire to date again and find a new mother for Junior, and sabotages each of his dates.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: Feed the Kitty
recommendations.overview: A bulldog adopts an adorable kitten, but he can't let his owner know.

recommendations.title: Storks
recommendations.overview: Storks deliver babies…or at least they used to. Now they deliver packages for a global internet retail giant. Junior, the company’s top delivery stork, is about to be promoted when he accidentally activates the Baby Making Machine, producing an adora

recommendations.title: Barbie: A Perfect Christmas
recommendations.overview: The vacation plans of Barbie and her sisters take a turn due to a snowstorm. Stranded in Tannenbaum town, they find themselves amidst a holiday venture where they learn a heartwarming lesson.
